MList_if.solution:
Lemma MList_if : forall (p:loc) (L:list val),
  MList L p =
  (if p = null then \[L = nil] else
   \exists x L' q, \[L = x :: L'] \* (p`.head ~~> x) \* (p`.tail ~~> q) \* MList L' q).
Proof using.
  intros. destruct L as [|x L'].
  { simpl. rewrite MList_nil. xsimpl. { auto. } { intros. subst. auto. } }
  { simpl. rewrite MList_cons. xsimpl. { intros. false. } { auto. } }
Qed.
MList_if.explanation: MList_if reformulates MList by case analysis on whether p is null. When null, L must be nil; otherwise decompose into head and tail.

triple_mlength.explanation: Prove by structural induction on the list using well-founded induction on list_sub. Base case: null pointer means empty list. Recursive case: read tail, recurse, add 1.

triple_mlength'.solution:
Lemma triple_acclength : forall L p n,
  triple (acclength n p)
    (MList L p)
    (fun r => \[r = n + length L] \* MList L p).
Proof using.
  intros L. induction_wf IH: list_sub L. intros.
  xwp. xchange MList_if. xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xval. xchange <- MList_nil. xsimpl. rew_list. math. }
  { intros x L' q ->. xapp. xapp. { auto. }
    xchange <- MList_cons. xsimpl. rew_list. math. }
Qed.

Lemma triple_mlength' : forall L p,
  triple (mlength' p)
    (MList L p)
    (fun r => \[r = length L] \* MList L p).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp triple_acclength. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_mlength'.explanation: First prove triple_acclength for the accumulator version, then derive triple_mlength' by calling acclength with initial accumulator 0.

Triple_mfree.solution:
Lemma triple_mfree : forall L p,
  triple (mfree p)
    (MList L p)
    (fun _ => \[]).
Proof using.
  intros L. induction_wf IH: list_sub L. intros.
  xwp. xchange MList_if. xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xval. xsimpl. }
  { intros x L' q ->. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. { auto. } xsimpl. }
Qed.
Triple_mfree.explanation: Free all nodes of the mutable list by recursion. Read tail, free head and tail fields, then recurse on the rest.

triple_mrev.solution:
Lemma triple_mrev_aux : forall L1 L2 p1 p2,
  triple (mrev_aux p1 p2)
    (MList L1 p1 \* MList L2 p2)
    (fun r => MList (rev L1 ++ L2) r).
Proof using.
  intros L1. induction_wf IH: list_sub L1. intros.
  xwp. xchange (MList_if p1). xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xval. rew_list. xsimpl. auto. }
  { intros x L1' q ->. xapp. xapp. xapp. { auto. }
    xsimpl. rew_list. rewrite <- app_assoc. auto. }
Qed.

Lemma triple_mrev : forall L p,
  triple (mrev p)
    (MList L p)
    (fun r => MList (rev L) r).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp triple_mrev_aux. rew_list. xsimpl.
Qed.
triple_mrev.explanation: mrev_aux reverses L1 while prepending to L2. Prove the auxiliary lemma first, then derive mrev by starting with empty accumulator.

triple_push.solution:
Lemma triple_push : forall L s x,
  triple (push s x)
    (Stack L s)
    (fun _ => Stack (x :: L) s).
Proof using.
  intros. unfold Stack. xwp.
  xapp. xapp. xapp triple_mcons'. xapp. xapp.
  xsimpl. rew_list. math.
Qed.
triple_push.explanation: Push reads the list pointer and size from the stack record, conses x onto the list, and updates the stack fields.

triple_pop.solution:
Lemma triple_pop : forall L s,
  L <> nil ->
  triple (pop s)
    (Stack L s)
    (fun r => \exists x L', \[L = x :: L'] \* \[r = x] \* Stack L' s).
Proof using.
  introv HL. unfold Stack. xwp.
  xapp. xchange MList_if. case_if.
  { xpull. intros ->. false. }
  { xpull. intros x L' q ->. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp.
    xchange <- (MList_cons q). xsimpl. rew_list. math. }
Qed.
triple_pop.explanation: Pop reads the list from the stack, extracts head and tail, updates the stack's list pointer and decrements size.

triple_top.solution:
Lemma triple_top : forall L s,
  L <> nil ->
  triple (top s)
    (Stack L s)
    (fun r => \exists x L', \[L = x :: L'] \* \[r = x] \* Stack L s).
Proof using.
  introv HL. unfold Stack. xwp.
  xapp. xchange MList_if. case_if.
  { xpull. intros ->. false. }
  { xpull. intros x L' q ->. xapp.
    xchange <- (MList_cons q). xsimpl. auto. }
Qed.
triple_top.explanation: Top reads the list from the stack and returns the head without modifying the stack.

triple_mnode'.solution:
Lemma triple_mnode' : forall T1 T2 n p1 p2,
  triple (mnode n p1 p2)
    (MTree T1 p1 \* MTree T2 p2)
    (funloc p => MTree (Node n T1 T2) p).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp triple_mnode. intros p.
  xchange <- MTree_Node. xsimpl.
Qed.
triple_mnode'.explanation: Derive triple_mnode' from triple_mnode by folding the MTree representation.

triple_tree_copy.solution:
Lemma triple_tree_copy : forall p T,
  triple (tree_copy p)
    (MTree T p)
    (fun r => MTree T p \* \exists T', \[T' = T] \* MTree T' r).
Proof using.
  intros p T. gen p. induction_wf IH: tree_sub T. intros.
  xwp. xchange MTree_if. xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xval. xchange <- MTree_Leaf. xsimpl. auto. }
  { intros n T1 T2 p1 p2 ->.
    xapp. xapp. xapp. { auto. } xapp. { auto. }
    xapp triple_mnode'. intros q.
    xchange <- MTree_Node. xsimpl. auto. }
Qed.
triple_tree_copy.explanation: Copy a tree by structural recursion. Leaf case returns null. Node case copies left and right subtrees, then allocates a new node.

triple_mtreesum.solution:
Lemma triple_treeacc : forall T p n,
  triple (treeacc n p)
    (MTree T p)
    (fun r => \[r = n + treesum T] \* MTree T p).
Proof using.
  intros T. induction_wf IH: tree_sub T. intros.
  xwp. xchange MTree_if. xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xval. xchange <- MTree_Leaf. xsimpl. simpl. math. }
  { intros v T1 T2 p1 p2 ->.
    xapp. xapp. xapp. { auto. }
    xapp. { auto. }
    xchange <- MTree_Node. xsimpl. simpl. math. }
Qed.

Lemma triple_mtreesum : forall T p,
  triple (mtreesum p)
    (MTree T p)
    (fun r => \[r = treesum T] \* MTree T p).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp triple_treeacc. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_mtreesum.explanation: First prove the accumulator version treeacc, then derive mtreesum by calling treeacc with accumulator 0.

triple_apply_counter_abstract.solution:
Lemma triple_apply_counter_abstract : forall f n,
  triple (f ())
    (IsCounter f n)
    (fun r => \[r = n] \* IsCounter f (n+1)).
Proof using.
  intros. unfold IsCounter. xpull. intros p.
  xapp. xsimpl.
Qed.
triple_apply_counter_abstract.explanation: Unfold IsCounter to get the concrete counter state, apply the counter function spec, then refold IsCounter.

triple_test_counter.solution:
Lemma triple_test_counter :
  triple (test_counter ())
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = 2]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp triple_create_counter_abstract. intros f.
  xapp triple_apply_counter_abstract.
  xapp triple_apply_counter_abstract.
  xapp triple_apply_counter_abstract.
  xval. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_test_counter.explanation: Create a counter, apply it 3 times (returning 0, 1, 2), and return the last result.

triple_miter.solution:
Lemma triple_miter : forall (I:list val->hprop) L (f:val) p,
  (forall x L1 L2, L = L1 ++ x :: L2 ->
    triple (f x)
      (I L1)
      (fun _ => I (L1 ++ x :: nil))) ->
  triple (miter f p)
    (MList L p \* I nil)
    (fun _ => MList L p \* I L).
Proof using.
  intros I L. gen I. induction_wf IH: list_sub L. intros.
  xwp. xchange MList_if. xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xval. xchange <- MList_nil. xsimpl. }
  { intros x L' q ->.
    xapp. xapp. { applys H. rewrite app_nil_l. auto. }
    xapp. { auto. } { intros x' L1' L2' HE.
      applys H. rewrite <- app_assoc. simpl. rewrite HE. auto. }
    xchange <- MList_cons. xsimpl. rewrite <- app_assoc. simpl. auto. }
Qed.
triple_miter.explanation: Prove miter by induction on the list. The invariant I tracks processed elements. Each iteration applies f to the current element.

triple_mlength_using_miter.solution:
Lemma triple_mlength_using_miter : forall p L,
  triple (mlength_using_miter p)
    (MList L p)
    (fun r => \[r = length L] \* MList L p).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp. intros c.
  xapp (triple_miter (fun L1 => c ~~> length L1)).
  { intros x L1 L2 ->. xwp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl.
    rew_list. math. }
  xapp. xapp. xsimpl. auto.
Qed.
triple_mlength_using_miter.explanation: Use miter with a counter reference as the iteration state. The invariant tracks that counter = length of processed prefix.

triple_cps_facto_aux.solution:
Lemma triple_cps_facto_aux : forall (n:int) (k:val) (F:int->int),
  n >= 0 ->
  (forall (m:int), triple (k m) \[] (fun r => \[r = F m])) ->
  triple (cps_facto_aux n k)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = F (facto n)]).
Proof using.
  introv Hn. gen k F. induction_wf IH: (downto 0) n. intros.
  xwp. xapp. xif; intros C.
  { xapp. xapp. { math. } { math. }
    { intros m. xwp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl. rewrite facto_succ; math. }
    xsimpl. auto. }
  { assert (n = 0) by math. subst. xapp. xsimpl. auto. }
Qed.
triple_cps_facto_aux.explanation: CPS factorial: when n>0, recurse with continuation that multiplies result by n. When n=0, call k with 1.

triple_cps_facto.solution:
Lemma triple_cps_facto : forall n,
  n >= 0 ->
  triple (cps_facto n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = facto n]).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp triple_cps_facto_aux. { math. }
  { intros m. xwp. xval. xsimpl. auto. }
  xsimpl. auto.
Qed.
triple_cps_facto.explanation: cps_facto calls cps_facto_aux with the identity continuation (fun x => x).

triple_cps_append_aux.solution:
Lemma triple_cps_append_aux : forall H Q (L1 L2:list val) (p1 p2:loc) (k:val),
  (forall (p:loc), triple (k p) (MList (L1 ++ L2) p \* H) Q) ->
  triple (cps_append_aux p1 p2 k)
    (MList L1 p1 \* MList L2 p2 \* H)
    Q.
Proof using.
  intros H Q L1. gen H Q. induction_wf IH: list_sub L1. intros.
  xwp. xchange (MList_if p1). xif; intros C; case_if; xpull.
  { intros ->. xapp. xsimpl. rewrite app_nil_l. auto. }
  { intros x L1' q ->.
    xapp. xapp. { auto. }
    { intros p. xwp. xapp. xapp. rewrite <- app_assoc. simpl.
      xchange <- MList_cons. auto. }
    auto. }
Qed.
triple_cps_append_aux.explanation: CPS append traverses L1, then in the continuation rewires the last tail pointer to p2. Proven by induction on L1.

triple_cps_append.solution:
Lemma triple_cps_append : forall (L1 L2:list val) (p1 p2:loc),
  triple (cps_append p1 p2)
    (MList L1 p1 \* MList L2 p2)
    (fun r => MList (L1 ++ L2) r).
Proof using.
  intros. xwp. xapp triple_cps_append_aux.
  { intros p. xwp. xval. xsimpl. auto. }
  xsimpl.
Qed.
triple_cps_append.explanation: cps_append calls cps_append_aux with identity continuation, then returns the result pointer.
